warnings: Unlike PNGs 48-56, this PNG (หน้า57) contains only ONE portrait sheet (19/19, on the right half) - the left half of the landscape scan is entirely blank white space, not a second sheet. This is the final sheet of the 19-page BOQ document (10 PNGs x 2 sheets = 20 slots, but the document only has 19 total sheets, so the last PNG holds only one).

Only the category-5 header row is printed; the entire data grid below it is blank (no line items, quantities, or prices) on this sheet - this appears to be an intentionally unfilled placeholder category (miscellaneous/contingency allowance) at the end of this BOQ.
Cross-checked against prior round mk_test/t1/..._หน้า57.json: content and single-sheet structure agree exactly.
